reviews.review_description: Ok. Kind of gave me a sore neck, from aways looking upward. Also trigger is not very responsive. Less lag time would make this game more playable.
Boring game which stuttered on my s8
It's a shooter like a lot of titles in the Gear VR but man is it beautiful. I can't stop exploring this visual marvel!
Got potential to be a good game ! Not fast paced and a bit repetitive. All you do is look around and wait for the next wave of enemies! I like how it looks though. So for now i give it 2 stars.
Has a beautiful environment, nice wave shooter.. sound could use a bit of work.. but overly great ^_^

Look i have no problem paying for games and supporting devs but why is this a buxk liyerally the most basic game pretty background boom theres your buck i guess? Lol i give it a 3 because it works and if it was free it would get  3.25 stars sorry just way to basic and clealry it hasnt been updated in years so its Long abandoned fastest purchase ro uninstall yet lol but maybe for a measly buck u will get more fun outta it
